title: UK semiconductor researcher trip to Republic of Korea: applications open
body: "The Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT) is inviting ambitious semiconductor researchers and organisations to apply and attend the:    EU-RoK Semiconductor Researcher Forum, and Republic of Korea’s Global Conference of Innovation Materials 2025 conference   We welcome applications from all stakeholders that would benefit from collaboration with the Republic of Korea (RoK) and European Union (EU) in areas of semiconductor research.  The deadline for applications is Friday 16 May 2025. The visit is from the 14 to 19 June 2025.  "
